tool.name: Topaz Denoise
tool.description: Denoise cryo-EM micrographs using deep U-Net models
tool.command:
#import re mkdir -p input_images && mkdir -p output_images && #for $img in $micrographs: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($img.element_identifier)) #if not $clean_name.endswith('.mrc') and not $clean_name.endswith('.tiff') and not $clean_name.endswith('.png'): #set $clean_name = $clean_name + "." + str($img.ext) #end if ln -s '$img' 'input_images/$clean_name' && #end for
topaz denoise -m '$model_' --lowpass $lowpass --gaussian $gaussian --inv-gaussian $inv_gaussian $deconvolve --deconv-patch $deconv_patch --pixel-cutoff $pixel_cutoff -s $patch_size -p $patch_padding $normalize $stack --format '$format_' --device $device --num-threads $num_threads -o output_images input_images/*

param.name: micrographs
param.label: Micrograph Images
param.help: Select one or more micrographs to denoise.

param.name: lowpass
param.label: Lowpass Filter Cutoff
param.help: Lowpass filter micrographs by this amount (in pixels) before denoising. 1.0 means no filtering.

param.name: gaussian
param.label: Gaussian Filter SD
param.help: Gaussian filter micrographs with this standard deviation (in pixels) before denoising. 0.0 means no filtering.

param.name: inv_gaussian
param.label: Inverse Gaussian Filter SD
param.help: Inverse Gaussian filter micrographs with this standard deviation (in pixels) before denoising. 0.0 means no filtering.

param.name: deconvolve
param.label: Apply Gaussian Deconvolution
param.help: Apply optimal Gaussian deconvolution filter before denoising.

param.name: deconv_patch
param.label: Deconvolution Patches
param.help: Apply spatial covariance correction to this many patches.

param.name: pixel_cutoff
param.label: Pixel Cutoff SD
param.help: Set pixels >= this number of SDs away from the mean to the mean. Use 0.0 to disable.

param.name: patch_size
param.label: Patch Size
param.help: Denoise micrographs in patches of this size. Default: 1024.

param.name: patch_padding
param.label: Patch Padding
param.help: Padding around each patch to remove edge artifacts. Default: 500.

param.name: stack
param.label: Denoise as MRC Stack
param.help: Check if processing a single MRC stack file instead of a list of micrographs.

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool uses deep learning U-net models to denoise cryo-EM micrographs and tomograms. Denoising significantly improves visual contrast and the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of micrographs, making manual evaluation and downstream automated particle picking much easier and more reliable.
